excerpt: Massive stability update with self-repair systems, popup inactivity tracking, API protection, cleaner UI, reporting systems, and major lag fixes.
body:
This update mainly focuses on stability, recovery systems, and reducing lag across the extension. We added smarter API protection, popup inactivity handling, reporting systems, and multiple fixes for scheduled removals and popup loading.

We also cleaned up old systems, updated the UI, removed broken features, and improved extension recovery when services temporarily go offline.

added.moreInfo: If you stay inactive for too long, a 30-second warning will appear before the popup automatically closes.
Warnings now appear across all pages whenever the base API is temporarily unavailable.
Added a new experimental badge in settings alongside warning notices for unstable features.
The error handler can now force multiple recovery methods to help get the extension working again.
Added a global background cooldown system to prevent false notification spam.
Added daily scheduled removal limits. VIP users can bypass the restriction.
Users can now report broken settings directly through the extension.
Users can now report popup or settings errors directly from the extension.
Added a new orange color theme.
Added a custom uninstall page when removing the extension.

removed.moreInfo: Removed the old seasonal theme and fixed the glitch where it appeared briefly while the popup was loading.
Removed due to reliability issues, excessive API calls, and lag spikes.
Removed old unused modal HTML and CSS files to clean up the extension.
Removed the old gold theme from the extension.

fixed.moreInfo: Error messages now properly appear in both the popup and settings.
Scheduled removals are now less laggy and properly work again.
Fixed issues causing the dropdown system to malfunction.
Fixed the red theme colors to properly match the intended design.
The extension now skips unnecessary API loading when services are offline.

improved.moreInfo: Removed excessive roundness from popup elements for a cleaner design.
The extension now checks API status before every request to prevent spam while services are offline.
Reduced lag and improved overall settings loading performance.
Updated all modals to better match the extension UI with a cleaner appearance.
Moved Block Mode into Removal Settings and reorganized color theme dropdowns.
Added multiple backend and recovery improvements to make the extension more stable during failures.
